about.title: Guilherme Fernandes
about.description: I have a strong passion for creating websites and exploring new technologies, always looking for new ways to innovate and improve my skills. When I am not coding, I enjoy reading books, watching engaging series, and dedicating time to studying and expanding my knowledge.

interfaces.title: Interface design
interfaces.subtitle: I create modern and intuitive visual interfaces for websites, ensuring a great experience for users. My goal is to transform ideas into attractive and functional layouts, always focusing on usability and visual identity.

web.title: Web development
web.subtitle: I develop complete websites and applications, taking care of both the visual side and the logic behind how everything works. I use modern technologies to build fast, secure, and scalable sites.

optimization.title: Website optimization and maintenance
optimization.subtitle: I ensure your website is always fast, secure, and up to date. I work on performance optimizations and SEO improvements to avoid issues and guarantee the best possible experience for visitors.

wordpress.title: Website creation with WordPress
wordpress.subtitle: I build professional and customized websites using WordPress. From blogs to business sites, I deliver flexible, responsive, and easy-to-manage solutions, ensuring your project has great online performance.

items.next: Next.js is a front-end web framework that enables features like server-side rendering and static site generation for modern React applications.
items.react: React is an open-source JavaScript library focused on building user interfaces for the web in a component-based way.
items.typescript: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that adds optional static typing, increasing safety and predictability and helping catch errors earlier in development.
items.tailwind: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework that provides low-level classes so you can build fully custom components directly in your markup.
items.nest: NestJS is a back-end framework for Node.js using TypeScript, with a modular architecture inspired by Angular and focused on scalable server-side applications.
items.elysia: Elysia is a web framework for Node.js focused on high performance and simplicity, ideal for building fast and lightweight APIs as an alternative to Express.js.
items.reactHookForm: React Hook Form is a library for managing forms in React using hooks, improving performance and simplifying state and validation handling.
items.apis: APIs (Application Programming Interfaces) are sets of rules and definitions that enable communication between different systems, making integration and data sharing easier.
items.aws: AWS (Amazon Web Services) is Amazon's cloud computing platform, offering infrastructure, databases, storage, and many other services for scalable applications.
items.wordpress: WordPress is a PHP-based content management system (CMS) widely used to create blogs and professional websites with a high level of customization.
items.postgresql: PostgreSQL is an open-source relational database management system known for its robustness, extensibility, and strong standards compliance.
items.mongodb: MongoDB is a non-relational, document-oriented database that stores data in a JSON-like format, offering flexible schemas.
items.vue: Vue.js is a progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces and SPAs, with a gentle learning curve and great flexibility.
items.discord: Discord.js is a powerful Node.js library that makes it easy to interact with the Discord API and build organized, feature-rich bots.
items.laravel: Laravel is an open-source PHP framework for building web applications following the MVC pattern, focused on developer productivity and elegant code.
items.englishB2: I have B2-level English (upper-intermediate), which allows me to communicate clearly in professional contexts, join meetings, read technical documentation, and write with good clarity.

satellitus.description: I work on the development and maintenance of legacy systems, implementing new features, fixes, and improvements, while collaborating daily with the team on continuous enhancements.

rami.description: I worked as an IT intern at RAMI Indústria Gráfica, providing technical support to users, developing internal systems, and maintaining the IT infrastructure.

freelancer.description: Development of websites and web applications on demand for different clients, from solution design to production deployment.

granaEmDia.name: Grana em Dia
granaEmDia.description: Personal finance control website where you can register expenses and income, create transaction categories, and access a dynamic dashboard with month and year filters.
granaEmDia.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Grana em Dia project

tectrain.name: Tectrain | Consulting Management
tectrain.description: Management system for a technology consulting company, with interactive activities, dynamic dashboards, AI chatbots, and relational tables management.
tectrain.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Tectrain consulting management project

revzap.name: Revzap
revzap.description: WhatsApp Web support extension built to improve customer experience and increase the efficiency and productivity of the support team.

plasticaDeFace.name: Plástica de Face
plasticaDeFace.description: Professional WordPress website for Dr. Leonardo, with custom design, performance optimization, and specific features tailored to the client's needs.
plasticaDeFace.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Plástica de Face website

futureOnline.name: Future Online
futureOnline.description: License management panel for a browser extension, created alongside the extension itself to provide seamless control and access for users.
futureOnline.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Future Online panel

amorCelestial.name: Amor Celestial
amorCelestial.description: Platform that connects soulmates using OpenAI's artificial intelligence, analyzing profiles and affinities with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and the OpenAI API.
amorCelestial.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Amor Celestial platform

nike.name: Nike
nike.description: Minimalist landing page inspired by Nike's website, built to practice Framer Motion and explore advanced animations and transitions.
nike.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Nike landing page project

paqueta.name: Paquetá
paqueta.description: Front-end project for a shoe e-commerce store, with a modern, intuitive, and responsive interface focused on providing a smooth shopping experience.

hubDesk.name: Hub Desk
hubDesk.description: Platform created to connect people to Desks, interactive spaces for discussions in different areas, ideal for knowledge sharing, feedback, and networking.
hubDesk.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Hub Desk project

allNade.name: All Nade
allNade.description: Website developed to simplify the discovery of new movies and organize favorites, allowing users to explore, save, and manage lists quickly and efficiently.
allNade.imageAlt: Screenshot of the All Nade project

tituloMed.name: TituloMED
tituloMed.description: Application created to make Chemistry classes more dynamic and interactive, with tools that enhance online teaching and provide a more engaging experience for students.

wikiDemonSlayer.name: Wiki Demon Slayer
wikiDemonSlayer.description: Web application built to practice creating and consuming APIs in a React.js website, exploring back-end and front-end integration with a focus on a smooth user experience.
wikiDemonSlayer.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Wiki Demon Slayer project
